title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube video news roundup covering recent AI developments including new model releases (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3), avatar and video generation tools, text-to-speech advances, and discussion of Claude Fable's discontinuation. The video reviews multiple open-source and commercial AI tools and research projects.
writeup: This AI Search roundup surveys recent releases across model, media, and speech tooling. It covers new large language models (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3), full body avatar and video generation tools, and text-to-speech advances, alongside the discontinuation of Claude Fable. Underlying concepts touched include sparse attention, diffusion models, real-time translation, and text-to-image generation, spanning both open-source and commercial projects.
